subcodes.first_line: O thou who servest the chosen ones of God! The people of envy have conspired to dishonor that body and lay it waste [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من خدم اولیاءالله ان اهل الحسد تواطئوا علی توهین ذلک الجسد و تضییع ذلک
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @justice and wrath of God, @eulogies; reminiscences
